equipment.vna: Keysight E5071C ENA Series Network Analyzer

conditions.notes: Measured without the 10 dB attenuator after the LO. This raises the power level at detector inputs to where it has a linear response.

system_configuration.measurement_path: LO output to detector input (after filter)
system_configuration.splitter_8way: QM-PD8-ST 5-1000M RF Power Divider VHF UHF 1-To-8 Power Splitter

measurements.notes: Measured end-to-end S21 from LO output to detector input (after passing through filter). These measurements capture cable loss, splitter loss, and filter insertion loss for the complete RF path.

quality_checks.no_cable_resonances: Likely no resonances - smooth passband shape is acceptable
quality_checks.notes: Filter passbands look excellent with minimal peak-to-peak variations (~13-14.5 dB insertion loss). All filters show smooth frequency response around center frequencies.

notes: Measurements performed without the 10dB attenuator that was previously in the RF path
Filter numbering convention: 1-21 (Filter 1 = 904.0 MHz, Filter 21 = 956.0 MHz)
Each file is approximately 201KB in standard Touchstone format
VNA settings: -20 dBm output, 70 kHz IF bandwidth, 16x averaging, 1.5% smoothing aperture
future_work: S21 values confirmed to match expected cable/splitter/filter losses
Periodic validation measurements to track filter degradation over time
Compare with previous measurements if available
Integrate with log detector calibration for absolute power measurements
Test S-parameter loading in dashboard viewers
